arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich monitoring Arsenal target Martín Zubimendi as Joshua Kimmich alternative
arts.sum: As Bayern Munich continues efforts to extend defensive midfielder and junior captain Joshua Kimmich, a familiar name is popping up on the rumor mill: Real Sociedad and Spanish men’s national team star Martín Zubimendi. Could the 25-year-old, a talented No. 6 in his own right, be an alternative for the Bavarians should Kimmich decide to leave?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich reach verbal agreement with FC Köln’s Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: As reported by Florian Plettenberg, Bayern Munich have reached a verbal agreement with FC Köln’s Jonas Urbig. The Bundesliga side had already registered their interest in the Germany U21 goalkeeper…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s U-14s, U-15s and U-16s all compete in weekend long big tournaments
arts.sum: On the first day of the tournament, the Munich team made an impressive start to the group phase. A 4:2 triumph over NK Maribor and two draws against Slavia Prague (0:0) and AKA SV Ried (2:2) rounded off the group phase of the tournament.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Hoffenheim: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: Bayern keep rattling off wins while Hoffenheim has forgotten what celebrating in the locker room feels like. Bayern Munich and Hoffenheim are headed in opposite directions.

arts.ttl: Disappearing act? Harry Kane talks game involvement as a Bayern Munich striker
arts.sum: As a player with superstar striker status, Harry Kane is used to the weight of expectations. “And there, you have to know how to stay very focused on the game, on the smallest movements, the smallest details, the smallest deflections, to spring forth at the right moment.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies to answer Man Utd this weekend
arts.sum: Davies is a key target for Man Utd in 2025, although Real Madrid are considered favourites to sign him on a free transfer. Davies will make a final decision on his future in the coming days and whether to leave the club on a free transfer at the end of the season when his contract expires.

arts.ttl: Can Andrej Kramarić dent Bayern Munich’s title aspirations?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich host Hoffenheim tonight and although clear favourites, the Rekordmeister must be way of Andrej Kramarić. No active Bundesliga player has scored more goals against Bayern than Kramarić, who…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s U-19s excel yet falter at the last hurdle in thrilling Mercedes-Benz Junior Cup
arts.sum: In the round of the last four, the Munich team were able to impress again and secured their place in the final thanks to a 4:3 victory over 1. In the intermediate round, the Munich team had exciting duels, but were narrowly defeated 1-2 by Servette FC Geneva and 3-4 by VfB Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich signs US youngster Bajung Darboe from LAFC
arts.sum: Darboe has signed a “long-term contract” and will join Bayern’s reserve team, the German club said Wednesday. At club level, he has played for the reserve teams of LAFC and the Philadelphia Union.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany says Josip Stanišić is “very close”, but João Palhinha and Hiroki Itō are still relatively far away from a return
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has become accustomed to dealing with a multitude of injury situations, but things are looking up (well, at least partially) for a few players. Hopefully, the injury situation rapidly improves for all three players.
